home.desc:
引擎版本： Lua 5.4
支持中文变量
home.name: Lua 引擎主页
home.title: Lua 引擎主页

modules.demo_code:
---@diagnostic disable: missing-return
---@class event
local event = {}

-- 框架加载时机
function event.LibInit() end

-- 脚本运行时机
function event.LuaMain() end

do -- 单位
    ---@class Unit.AttackLaunch.EventData
    ---@field public source handle
    ---@field public target handle

    ---@param data Unit.AttackLaunch.EventData
    ---@return integer 1 = 拦截攻击 0 = 默认攻击
    -- 攻击出手
    function event.on_unit_attack_launch(data) end

    -- 伤害中心
    function event.on_unit_damage(data) end

    ---@enum UnitAbility.ChanelEventData.TargetType
    local TargetType = {
        [0] = 'NULL',
        [1] = 'Unit',
        [2] = 'Item',
        [3] = 'UNK',
    }

    ---@class UnitAbility.ChanelEventData
    ---@field public id integer
    ---@field public type UnitAbility.ChanelEventData.TargetType
    ---@field public target handle
    ---@field public x number
    ---@field public y number

    -- 技能施法
    ---@param data UnitAbility.ChanelEventData
    function event.on_ability_channel(data) end
end

do -- 投射物
    ---@class Missile.EventData
    ---@field public id integer

    ---@param data Missile.EventData
    function event.on_missile_target_death(data) end

    ---@param data Missile.EventData
    function event.on_missile_line_death(data) end
end

do
    -- 硬件拦截
    function event.message_hook(data) end

    ---@class Message.OrderHook
    ---@field [1] Message.OrderType 命令类型
    ---@field [2] integer 命令ID
    ---@field [3] handle 目标handle
    ---@field [4] number X坐标
    ---@field [5] number Y坐标
    ---@field [6] number flag

    -- 命令拦截
    ---@param data Message.OrderHook
    function event.order_hook(data) end

    ---@alias Message.ScreenMessageType
    ---| 'screen_message'

    ---@class Message.ScreenMessage
    ---@field [1] Message.ScreenMessageType 消息类型
    ---@field [2] number X坐标
    ---@field [3] number Y坐标
    ---@field [4] string 消息内容
    ---@field [5] number 持续时间
    ---@field [6] integer 未知

    -- 屏幕消息拦截
    ---@param data Message.ScreenMessage
    function event.screen_message_hook(data) end
end

do -- 界面
    -- 大头像更新事件
    function event.on_portraitbutton_change(data) end

    ---@class Unit.ScreenEnum.EventData
    ---@field public unit handle

    -- 屏幕选取单位
    ---@param data Unit.ScreenEnum.EventData
    function event.on_unit_enum_screen(data) end

    -- 单位进入屏幕
    ---@param data Unit.ScreenEnum.EventData
    function event.on_unit_enter_screen(data) end

    -- 单位离开屏幕
    ---@param data Unit.ScreenEnum.EventData
    function event.on_unit_leave_screen(data) end

    ---@enum CursorMode
    local CursorMode = {
        CURSOR_MODE_SELECTION_NONE = 0,
        CURSOR_MODE_SELECTION_NEUTRAL = 1,
        CURSOR_MODE_SELECTION_ENEMY = 2,
        CURSOR_MODE_SELECTION_SELF = 3,
        CURSOR_MODE_NO_TARGET = 4,
        CURSOR_MODE_TARGET_NEUTRAL = 5,
        CURSOR_MODE_TARGET_ENEMY = 6,
        CURSOR_MODE_TARGET_SELF = 7,
        CURSOR_MODE_TARGET_MINIMAP = 8,
        CURSOR_MODE_HOLD_ITEM = 9,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_LEFT = 10,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_RIGHT = 11,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_UP = 12,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_DOWN = 13,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_UP_LEFT = 14,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_UP_RIGHT = 15,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_DOWN_LEFT = 16,
        CURSOR_MODE_SCROLL_DOWN_RIGHT = 17,
    }

    ---@class Unit.CursorFrame.EventData
    ---@field public type CursorMode

    ---@param data Unit.CursorFrame.EventData
    function event.on_cursorframe_mode_change(data) end
end

do -- ImGui
    ---@class ImGuiUI.Create
    ---@field control ImGuiUI

    ---@param data ImGuiUI.Create
    function event.on_imgui_create(data) end
end

do -- 采集
    ---@class Unit.WispHarvest.LumberChange.EventData
    ---@field public player player
    ---@field public amount integer

    ---@class Unit.WispHarvest.Texttag.EventData
    ---@field public unit unit
    ---@field public amount integer
    ---@field public height number

    ---@param data Unit.WispHarvest.LumberChange.EventData
    ---@return integer 采集数量
    function event.on_wisp_harvest_lumber(data) end

    ---@param data Unit.WispHarvest.Texttag.EventData
    ---@return boolean 采集拦截
    function event.on_wisp_harvest_texttag(data) end
end

do -- 象牙塔造塔
    ---@class Unit.ItemBuild.EventData
    ---@field public build ability 技能
    ---@field public item item 物品
    ---@field public player player 玩家
    ---@field public unit unit 来源单位
    ---@field public unitID integer 要建造的单位类型
    ---@field public x number 要建造的单位X坐标
    ---@field public y number 要建造的单位Y坐标

    ---@param data Unit.ItemBuild.EventData
    ---@return unit 返回单位句柄
    function event.on_item_build_unit(data) end
end

do -- 镜像
    ---@class Unit.Mirror.EventData
    ---@field public source unit 来源单位
    ---@field public unit unit 镜像单位

    ---@param data Unit.Mirror.EventData
    function event.on_mirror_unit(data) end
end

return event
modules.name: jass.event
modules.title: jass.event

ability:build()

modules.demo_code:
log.open_dir() -- 打开日志目录
log.debug('Hello World')
log.tracy('Hello World')
log.error('Hello World')
log.info('Hello World')
log.warn('Hello World')
